F

Jokers' Deck

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3305-02-23 · 3 mentions
Active: 3305-02-23 → 3305-03-09
Description

Jokers' Deck is a organization in the Elite Dangerous universe, active from 3305-02-23 to 3305-03-09. Frequently linked with Diso, Ambrose Foundation, The Rewired. Key milestones: Supratech rescue (3305), Joker's Deck incident (3307), and current control of HIP 87621 through October Accords.

Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3312-03-03
Who Is Lexi October?
Vox Galactica profile of Lexi October reveals her rise from tech investor to dominant corporate power. Key milestones: Supratech rescue (3305), Joker's Deck incident (3307), and current control of HIP 87621 through October Accords.
3305-03-09
Disowned Heiress Admits Gambling Addiction
Disowned heiress Talitha Ambrose publicly admits to losing her family's entire fortune through gambling addiction, stating she feels liberated by poverty and plans to raise funds for addiction support charities.
3305-03-02
Heiress's Fortune Lost to Gambling
Lady Talitha Ambrose loses the entire 300 billion credit Ambrose Foundation fortune in a high-stakes game of deadlock poker with the secretive Jokers' Deck gambling ring, leading her mother Baroness Oksana to disown her.
3305-02-23
Heiress's Gambling Connections Revealed
Journalist Flint 'Firemaker' Lafosse reveals Lady Talitha Ambrose's long-standing association with the exclusive Jokers' Deck gambling circle, suggesting she may have gambled away the Ambrose fortune rather than being kidnapped.
